name: better-deepseek
desc: A powerful browser extension that supercharges DeepSeek Chat with custom tooling, persistent memory, and seamless project scaffolding. Generate and download fi…
descFull: A powerful browser extension that supercharges DeepSeek Chat with custom tooling, persistent memory, and seamless project scaffolding. Generate and download files, run Python in-browser, create PowerPoint and Excel documents, build multi-file projects as ZIP archives, and manage custom skills and characters.
